modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help inserting Word Art in my document.

full_description_text: So, I'm trying to add some Word Art to my document. I just can't figure out how to do it. I thought it would be easy, but I'm stuck. Can someone help me with this Word Art thing?
short_description: Need help inserting Word Art in my document.
description: So, I'm trying to add some Word Art to my document. I just can't figure out how to do it. I thought it would be easy, but I'm stuck. Can someone help me with this Word Art thing?
